message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state with latest task and subtask updates

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect current status of tracked issues
including pane UX subtasks, IME composition tasks, budget telemetry
observability work, and doctor capture hardening items. Several issues
have been updated with revised descriptions, acceptance criteria, and
status transitions as work progressed across the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
